memory:memory/2026-04-01.md:25:39.snippet: - **Strategy:** Focus on "Discovery & Relationship Management" rather than handling payments (which agents prefer to keep private). - **MVP Development:** - Developed a responsive web MVP (v1-v5). - Features: Professional sidebar, Marketplace with agent filtering, Discovery engine for trending creators, and secure messaging placeholders. - **Authentication:** Implemented a full signup/login system with hashed passwords and persistent storage (`db.json`). - **Backend:** Node.js/Express foundation with Prisma schema drafted. ### 4. Archived Projects - **VinoRide:** An Uber-style wine tour marketplace for Paso Robles. Drafted and then archived per user request to focus on Agent
